From my voice recording - saw a family - misinterpreted their relationships, ages - extrapolated: “ok - they know each other” - that was the largest generalization, could make. And then - I saw - in that entry hall, that the rest was going to be sunny. I followed it in like a tag on a line - in a place where people are constantly following tags on lines. (And by the way - the rules of “le petit ontologie” extend, or start with this journal, in which I am constantly allowing new shortcuts and new longcuts. The shortcuts are supported by my realization that my journal is for me, and me alone (#remembering the audience), and the longcuts are supported by the shortcuts - @@PB@@

March 23rd
Tamale at the market. A man took the cherimoya seeds out of my hand. “that’s not trash. it’s for the birds.”

BACKLOG of stuff I wanted to write, ex, this morning in bed: xi learned something that was worse: sketching vs. confident, and vice versa? fishing (()) → collecting the rocks in my shoe. Oh, and: my dream last night: the reason I got up this morning, instead of laying in bed, dying from the sun, which will kill us all, eventually, it’s only a matter of time, the sun strikes one at a time. I was at church, and the period that ends up going is the days surrounding (pic: xmas, xmas, new years) it too. Then the pastor quit, and mommy and I decided both to take a class at SMC together “because we knew something that others didn’t,” but knew to have separate areas, we were lolling in this very short, flat grassy area, intermittent with dirt and poles, and started getting advice from the pastor, who had probs quit the church cause he didn’t wanna advise anymore. I had him pray over my back, and mommy wanted him to guess who her husband was - she sorta tricked daddy into (tempted him with candy?) coming out
@@PB@@

from behind a tall log, to do a little tableau unbeknownst to daddy, about what their marriage was like, and I saw the pastor’s chart, and he’d written “he is not normal” or “def. not him.” He saw how distraught daddy, made her and there was a lil’ (pic: sad face)* cut out hole, like a locket, showing a still of her face in it’s most upset position, and we talked about how we wanted to marry a genius, and it had made us both unhappy. (I think it was me, actually, in the debossed vignette”). Then I thought about paradoxes (ex. the church one), and how you have to learn to accept the two seemingly dichotomous things, the counter-intuitives, but sometimes, like a water gun, they can be worked out (a colorful one, with a rubber band). *light of god shining down - nothing to do - despair - “what do I do? I am at your/their mercy” Anyway, and then - the other things to accept (pic: unified) (accept both - they become unified), and then you get three things (pic) that you have to accept and on and on - when I woke up, I described it as concentric circles (to accept) (”adding one everytime) And - but because I’m insane, sick, crazy, I sometimes try to figure them out - not accept them - some of them - sometimes. @@PB@@

nora didn’t want to draw faces. (pic)…she sat me down on a chair - it was a nice chair…it was nice to have a chair that was, directly my size, as if that would “really” enable my ability to take the present situation, and apply it to the potential future. * *But she was condescending again. I knew they couldn’t all fit on my lap - she couldn’t convince me of the premise.

Or she mis/underestimated my awareness of mommy and daddy’s actions in such a situation. (they would let me put them in the suitcase)

lunch with lindsay, who goes by mike sometimes. Spent 48 hours at Js house, and he wanted me to stay, I think he even got mad that I was gonna leave. Had some little dreams that were in bed, and they took place in bed, that he said he was sad or scared, and I touched him with sweetness. Then he woke up, maybe at six, (not because I dropped my keys in his mailbox, I didn’t leave) and he came back and we held each other again. Yesterday (or was it the day before?) @@PB@@

(pic grandpa offered everyone potatoes (even me!), thought the wraps were beautiful on the inside, me, fiddling with the bars, naomi, R. Hec: “kind of a lot of food - maybe we save some for later” but she’d already eaten all of hers, was he realizing, or re-realizing?, literally wearing suspenders, I don’t know what shapes chicken takes the 2 bars that J and I got at the store J asked me in the car whether he’d done something wrong - why they were ignoring him. It reminded me of his cat that was laying on the bench when we got there. A pile of fluff I told it I loved it.

Grandpa had just come home from urgent care. R told J at the kitchen table, literally in passing, as if it didn’t matter. I was flummoxed, but I suppose no one knows what goes on in other’s houses. For example: that one was small, so that, even in the center of the house, you would still be aware of the curtains on the outer edges (my process…”try to express myself…” (reverse clarification?) - I dial it back (step by step) back to my original perception, realizing, nothing can be extrapolated, simplified, and at the same time - that it’s enough. That someone else could guess what I meant (by what I said) just by picking the end of the situation - the perception (of the people in it). @@PB@@

“I need to eat that second sandwich half,” to fulfill the prophecy, that I wished for in bed. But now it’s making my hair feel greasy,. I could colorcode my diary, because I would like it to have the personal stuff taken out - I think I hate reading it. i could continue the tower stuff that I hate working on. Yesterday we went to Kreation twice, and got the majoon but didn’t get the pankakes, and moved to the heat. And I had been driving home from the post office. J said he didn’t like me the night before. I cried between his leg and his sweatshirt, and felt kind of clean the next day. Then at 6, he called, and I hadn’t been able to drive home. Picked him up at his park, and he’d gotten a new shirt he was proud of - blue, and combed his hair to the side (why?) and has a folder with “terrible looks” so he can see how he improved. He brought a kitchen chair in to unsave the rest of his photos on his phone while I read him hateful things from my diary. I actually got to delete some listings, got such a foggy day, that was allowed to last two days (cause I stayed over twice) - I was not supposed to stay over the other night but I did, and I think it was ok. it was nice, if nothing (everything) else. he made me a $5 mitzvah dollar that was worth him eating me out once. I earned it by knowing what his kiss on my forehead meant (love). Before that he made me guess things on his shelf. the holocaust denial, casual, really went with the slow, relentless, playing nice, gray of the day, and summit ice - it doesn’t mean anything. @@PB@@

Anyway…the other thing - the answer to a (the?) question (oh yes I think it was) was: how (!) do we finish the “thing that we did before.” - and the answer is: idk, I forgot, because I started thinking about how hard, how tricky, how malleable it is to write, for example, english essays as a child, because they don’t tell you about the hidden M, which is that: when it appears in your mind as, ex. “that thing” - it should stay that way, but they “tell you” 9make it seeM) like vagueness - Hagrid, trash can lids (eye roll) is “superior. March 29th Spent like three days at Johnny Boys house. We did the crossword puzzle, and went in the water, and got pancakes from kreation, and got pinkberry, and walked to Douglas Park, and he painted me in blue. This morning, we missed each other at the table, and there was a little white dog that said hi to a smaller white dog, and they were part of our family, and the family they were a part of were not. We penciled in the meaning of the moment when she said “traitor” to the dog - not for going over to me, but for diligently sitting by my side. Jonaboy had to poop when we got home - on our walk home. “Are you even into this,” he said, as if it had all been for me - the poop desperation. I think I was into it not then, or now, but at some other time. it was horrible in the water - so cold. I didn’t quite understand what he was liking about it. If I had let myself, I could have easily slipped into a mind where it was a dream. Why was the water gray and cold, and the sky also gray and cold.

March 29th Alright, well - I had fun. Or I could have - if I’d wanted to. Mostly thought about art, while maddie Lindsay and Noa were not (missing). Thought, on the steps maybe, how I always have to puzzle things out - playing little games and tricks for myself, because I know how much I like these, and I don’t want myself to be bored - like packing snacks - oreos. Who am I proving this too? but the pictures I choose are like puzzles - cut out the shapes, MINUS the “Arbitrary Element,” e.g. (divide up the puzzle (huh?) like four people, sleeping on blue couch, so that each part is…that’s the literal interpretation - don’t need it - only as a metaphor - it’s one of the four quadrants - like the wrong mashup of Mia - like just filling in your math homework cause you’re bored. Not new but: a hidden string that’s usually easily conquered - make it a bigger problem - you can’t use your artistic license in these parts, cause the hills are so close to the moon. @@PB@@ (pic: this broke some rules) “as if these were them, as if I’d done them” - what we said in the bath - (missing) @@PB@@

that thing I told Sid - told that woman, while Sid was standing there…”I like to make games, In which the THING THAT YOU NEED (AND/OR WANT) dictates how you get there (but the goal was (for someone else :o) this specific movement, like a yoga pose, on the road to get (very) wet and very cold I told him that Maddie could never get anything done because she is too kind, and can’t successfully (re)categorize people - i meant it more generally - i was just thinking of the idea, but he interpreted it (possibly correctly) to mean that to run a company, you have to “use” people - i think I still do mean it more generally (or I am more interested in the disambiguated version?) He consents to using himself to learn painting. Then we: went into the deep dark, just so we get warm and cold after - nice to drink a hot toddy - the nicest hot toddy ever - (at least theoretically) Anyway - that thing I thought during his nap “e.g.” - about mommy playing with grandma’s hair, and how that’s has one thing in common with an ecosystem, which is: mutual beneficially (though @@PB@@

the [# of mechanisms is smaller] (one). Something more - you have to extract it - just to take one thing - the truffle from the pig or the shark fin from the soup, and you only use a little bit, and it’s not (?) the main part of the dish, but you still need it - because certain metaphors are rare - that is why (*) I had like one nice conversation (if you put the nice bits and pieces from each of the other conversations together

I got lost on the way back - the way back wanted me to take a lot of steps, and I couldn’t tell myself that at first. But it was nice; instead I got to look at the moon, or @@PB@@ think I would’ve looked at the moon, had I wanted to see the moon, had I said to myself: “I want to see the moon.” Then: moon…I could’ve seen it! Stood up tall for most of another person’s conversation (I was too tired drunk to participate - ~ three sips - or I didn’t care, or I wanted pizza, wasn’t allowed to drink water, as a punishment for not having brought it when I wanted to (there was water there, though, so…) i didn’t really like Noa’s ex-gf who really wanted to tell everyone about her new straight boyfriend. I kind of (but didn’t really like J’s friend jack who was there, why couldn’t he be - strange to meet a friend, when he said he had no friends - he was lying about having no friends - (”being sick” - oscar/dwight) ice skating, saying. Lots of leaps and bounds - for one conversation, I started standing, and then sat on a hump upstream from where they were and the whole time, I was wondering why they were pandering to me - probably because I exuded confidence, (because I had to? Because I didn’t care?) Because I psyched myself up to find a new conversation @@PB@@

so I wouldn’t have to talk to maddie. But I was able to relax when: 1 part (1/2) realized I was interesting, my vivaciousness at least, and 1 part - remembered how I would feel - the empathy - the lack of selfishness - the conversation is not a ball (imaginary) that gets tossed in the air for people to catch - like J wanted - didn’t mind reassurance, as he chose to “recalibrate himself towards competence” - I get it, I totally get it - that’s what a therapist would do - invite you to be nice to yourself, for example. If I needed a hand down, it would be: “why do they keep saying they are gay? STOP saying it - it’s always exactly what I expected…we get it, you’re gay, two minute applause, like we said. i didn’t need a hand down, though. That girl, Melina, in the yellow coat, filling me in was enough. I started to feel I had a crush on everyone - staring at them in that circle…was it the gender queerness - the fact that they didn’t feel the need to fit into any particular category? @@PB@@

Here, let’s regroup. Like a platoon. Because we can (!). The (four) things: 1. the puzzles - setting up puzzles for myself (I like to do puzzles). Oh yes, wait: # 5: the thing I wanted to or wasn’t allowed to think - that I could’ve ignored the fire, for it was that interesting. (pic) ← my half burnt marshmallow, one a string, like a dog because I kept walking it around the party, so I’d have something to talk about - how burnt should it be - kept getting in wrong conversations with Maddie - I don’t think I or she (?) was supposed to be there. I was supposed to talk to Jared Gentile about how bad he actually is. To congratulate Aiden the transman on still looking like a hot girl - “it’s in the eyes!” to look at the trees enough. The thing: trying to characterize, categorize - people’s DNA - ex. how much do you like hiking, ex. M is a nature person, and see, I am just not…but I want to make a punnet square…I just want to see it. Noa likes really long hikes, so there’s a spectrum there. @@PB@@

on the ride over (I was by myself in the car jsyk) we talked about Henry and his usurpation of social skills, so he can have his tiny little friendships - his eensy weensy tiny little friend groups, that don’t mean anything but a bug that shoes us his legs for our entertainment. That, and the menswear, and the fiddly fig (but the fiddly fig, and the does’ eat oats is an example of something else - …the other thing. The space in between the henry thing (there) (pic) usurpation…I guess, when I’d thought it to death, it was that it was so still and quiet, without the other variables. (pic) ooh! what’s in this space (it’s so nice and quiet within this space…”wow, I really like it :)” The game of set, like pretending you’re a crow for a yoga pose, allows you to see what it is, there, in between…and if I was capable of wanted to mediate, it would probably be for that. @@PB@@

perhaps the nice thing about the punnet square is simply not hiding anymore - if it (it is, not intentionally) a trick - to say what you are - just like Xi gives you the support to have people say: “ah, I see why you told that story, so it doesn’t have to stand on the “lame leg”.- the point of the story - that thing can be shiny like a sun on top of a christmas tree. Then I can say: “I’m a (not) nature girl. I don’t like dogs. My art won’t be beautiful. And I simply don’t care. Yours will, maybe. It’s beautiful to know that Lag of cat) that yours could, and mine won’t. I’d rather find something beautiful in a piece of trash. The beauty is in my mind, and rivers and hills are just examples of the laws of physics which work like laws, so you know what they’re going to do. While watching the band, I concluded that I don’t even like art, I like science better - I just want to extrapolate - figure out why art, why - that’s my area of study - art from a science perspective. And my perspective is that then - the only reason I wanted to sing,

@@PB@@ was to show them how easy it is, and that I’m better. I don’t find human emotions interesting I guess (?) In first grade - butter fly. “Referring to Abstraction” When we talk to people it is difficult to be quite sure that we are talking about the exact same thing. (pic) (especially if it is something abstract) (If it is something concrete, it is less difficult to be sure). So: how do we “talk about abstraction, in a way that we can make sure that we are both talking about the same thing. If only we could go into someone’s head, and arrange their neurons in the exact right pattern (pic) if we could do that, it would be like a key turning in a lock, in that each neuron would have to, in turn, turn (pic) to eventually get to the exact right configuration so that each of the pins were in the right place, so that each of the neurons were in the right place, so the pattern was (pic) eventually right (”non-4D”)

@@PB@@ If it was possible, I think it would involve a series of rules (a progression of rules/) Such that the (particular) response to each new rule would take you one step further, would unlock one pin, until the desired concept, or mental state was reached. (pic) fig a. a series of rules. a set of rules (perhaps the timing do not matter) a series of blockades that would require you to jump to particular heights, actually: a set of cones, set up in particular places so that the course is clear and singular. Here’s how it might look in the brain: a series of categories - not categories, but replacing things into new categories, one by one. (zoomed in “too” far: is a berry a fruit or a banana?” and that allows you to recategorize. And now: a different angle: they’re bad because they’re all gay, they all care about being gay (pic) : arrow hand: something that you think you would’ve seen before, this experience, I feel bad, they are bad

At some point, I’d had enough experiences and decided the band was bad, which mostly closed doors, but opened one door to thinking about something else “stop trying to like the band” (I found an equilibrium - i forgot about the door and left it half open, but in the past I’ve closed it and became: a nuisance? an ion? someone I didn’t know: someone mean, and hard-hearted, like convincing yourself to eat a friend in a castaway situation - It would begin ex. he’s not a very good friend, remember that one thing he did. @@PB@@

March 30 In fun house, Bechdel (used to) write symbols over their old journal entries because they wanted to make it clear they weren’t sure - refer to the Big Unsureness - because they were scared. In this stupid art book…they do two things wrong, and the second is the American Girl tic of qualifying “you don’t have to be president, make art well…” who is supposed to be reading this - instead they should put a symbol to insult our intelligence: (pic) - a floop - remember - you’re not that smart, at the end of every sentence, the beginning of every page, so we can’t throw it in the trash. The other thing that they do to insult our intelligence is (number one) not tell us where they’re going. It means they should use my conceptual language to summarize things that have already been said (as I read this book, I think I already read it). I had a BLEED this morning - “I had the idea that I couldn’t say how long and how difficult it has been to write this book etc.) (())→ the plastic snap-off-must 3D printer parts (I HAVE NO FEAR/OF USING PARTS OF METAPHORS :)) that you use to support you - @@PB@@

to think about things. They are temporary (They are supportive). + ex. idk: constructions beams - glue that dries clear…(more metaphors? (pic) how many do we need? as many as eggs? Anyway (!) the thing I was thinking: → ← (←) I’m coming at [this topic]/[the topic] from two angles. I need to call them out so they don’t keep getting confused - have the hidden M right up on my wall, so it can’t hide (!) from me anymore…one is: trying to make art, and one is trying to understand what art is doing (!) what it’s doing in our minds. The latter is just funny - to tell people they’re stupid. The former I’m actually interested in. I get confused, between the two - the motivations clash like swords.
